company.name: Flytrex
company.notes: Drone delivery. Has Creative Marketing Manager.

research.status_summary: Flytrex is actively hiring and in aggressive expansion mode as of mid-2026, opening a new Texas manufacturing facility, launching new drone hardware (Sky2), and scaling commercial partnerships with Uber Eats, DoorDash, and Little Caesars.
research.hiring_policy: Flytrex is actively hiring (~4–5 open positions on LinkedIn/Glassdoor) but operational US roles explicitly require candidates to be authorized to work in the US with no sponsorship provided; no EOR-friendly or remote-first posture is publicly stated for tech/corporate roles, though some support team roles have been described as remote.
recent_news: May 21, 2026: Flytrex opened a drone manufacturing and maintenance facility in Pilot Point, Texas (~8,000 sq ft), targeting 60 DFW delivery sites and ~5M residents by mid-2027.

April 23, 2026: Flytrex launched its new Sky2 octocopter drone (8.8 lb payload — largest in food delivery) in partnership with Little Caesars in Wylie, TX, enabling two-large-pizza family meal delivery in ~4.5 minutes.

March 2026: Flytrex appointed former Waze CEO Noam Bardin as Executive Chairman, and announced geographic expansion to Little Elm, Holly Springs, and Granbury; a new airspace-sharing partnership with Wing (Google) was also highlighted.
research.growth_signal: Strong upward trajectory: Flytrex has surpassed 200,000 US deliveries, secured Uber as its first-ever drone-delivery investor (Corporate Minority round, Sept 2025), is doubling headcount per Bardin's stated goal, and is building toward 60 DFW delivery hubs by 2027.
research.fit_for_lior: Weak direct fit for Lior's Creative AI / Product Analyst / Vibe Coder profile — Flytrex's open roles are overwhelmingly operations/field-ops heavy (drone pilots, runners, delivery drivers), with the Creative Marketing Manager role already filled; no signals of AI-product or data analyst hiring.
